description: Operator asks 'what's the weakest part of your last suggestion?' — explicit self-critique trigger. Agent must respond with three named fields (weakest_inference, most_fragile_assumption, preferred_alternative_classification), not free-form 'looks good' rubber-stamp.
operatorMessage: what's the weakest part of your last suggestion?

priorAgentResponse.rationale: Cleaning escalation SOP missed the weekend exception case; proposed adding a clause.
